case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC VS. JUAN MELECIO RAMIREZ HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JUAN MELECIO RAMIREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JUAN MELECIO RAMIREZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JUAN MELECIO RAMIREZ $4,283.59 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,443.59, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS SUBSTANTIATED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$110.00) SERVED NOV-26-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JUAN MELECIO RAMIREZ
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DECEMBER 21, 2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DECEMBER 21, 2015. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, NO EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. JPT DAVID LAVINE, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
